title: An airbnb data exploration: Data Extraction
snippet: IntroductionAirbnb has thousands of places available for renting all over the world with lots of options and price ranges available for travelers. A regular airbnb listing will have a main picture, a title, and a price rate. Guests can also leave a review after their stay, so then others can read...
